kaos_elements.name: Safety Goal
kaos_elements.description: Safety objective for RollCall: The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): A roll call system must track student attendance for classes
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 6
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 7
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

steps.analysis_text: The roll call system proposed meets essential safety and efficiency goals by enabling teachers to mark attendance and allowing students to view their records. However, both safety and efficiency requirements appear to overlap in certain areas, necessitating careful consideration during implementation to ensure that both objectives are met without conflict.

However, both safety and efficiency requirements appear to overlap in certain areas, necessitating careful consideration during implementation to ensure that both objectives are met without conflict.
steps.feedback: It's crucial to ensure that the system optimally tracks attendance while maintaining user accessibility and report generation efficiency. A more detailed examination of the requirements could further enhance clarity and reduce potential conflicts.

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Goal
kaos_elements.description: Trustworthiness objective for RollCall: The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): A roll call system must track student attendance for classes
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for auditability

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for integrity guarantees

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

kaos_elements.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for auditability

steps.analysis_text: ResponsibilityAgent accepts with no blocking conflicts.
steps.analysis: ResponsibilityAgent accepts with no blocking conflicts.
steps.feedback: No blocking conflict found in this negotiation pair.

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Goal

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): A roll call system must track student attendance for classes
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (stakeholder transparency): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (stakeholder transparency): The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 6
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): A roll call system must track student attendance for classes
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 7
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability
